case_title: APARTMENT INVESTMENT AND MANAGEMENT COMPANY vs. FRANKLIN, EDWIN et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF APARTMENT INVESTMENT AND MANAGEMENT COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT FRANKLIN, EDWIN DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APARTMENT INVESTMENT AND MANAGEMENT COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRANKLIN, EDWIN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 80 NAVY ROAD S. F., AND ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES PER CCP 415.46.
